summary: Completed comprehensive testing of US Bakers CRM new features. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all 4 new/updated pages work correctly: CreditOrders, KitchenDashboardNew, ManageOrders (with camera dialog), and DeliveryDashboard (with payment status banner and address card).
critical_code_review_comments: Camera capture dialog cannot be fully tested in headless browser but button and error handling work correctly
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) CreditOrders page with summary cards, table, and complementary toggle, 2) KitchenDashboardNew with time-slot grouped orders and Start Preparing buttons, 3) ManageOrders camera capture dialog with Deliver vs Pickup branching (deliveryChoiceStep state), 4) DeliveryDashboard with payment status banner (FULLY PAID / PAYMENT PENDING) and prominent delivery address card with navigation button. Backend set-pickup endpoint correctly sets pickup_by_customer and needs_delivery fields.
features_tested: GET /api/kitchen/orders - returns kitchen orders for today
GET /api/time-slots - returns time slots for grouping
GET /api/delivery/available-orders - returns available orders for delivery
GET /api/delivery/my-orders - returns delivery person's assigned orders
GET /api/orders/manage - returns orders for manage orders page
GET /api/delivery/persons - returns list of delivery persons
CreditOrders page UI - summary cards, table, complementary toggle
KitchenDashboardNew UI - time-slot grouping, status badges, logout button
ManageOrders UI - status tabs, filters, pagination, Ready to Deliver button
ManageOrders camera dialog - Deliver vs Pickup choice (deliveryChoiceStep)
DeliveryDashboard UI - Available/My Orders tabs, payment status banner, address card with navigation
